Q=p(J)local Z=function()return L(V,{},J,Q)end return Z end return(b(10921682-(-490996),{}))(Q(w))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[J(193880-231288)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
